description: Ramadan-themed buffet promotion post featuring pricing, location tag, and restaurant mention to drive iftar dining reservations during the holy month.
structural_recipe: Open with 'Ramadan Mubarak' greeting. Feature buffet name and location in Arabic. Include per-person price in SAR prominently (format: X ريال). Add location emoji (📍) with neighborhood name. Tag restaurant/owner handle. Use simple, direct language without excessive hashtags. Emphasize value proposition and specific offering.
why_it_works: Ramadan is peak dining season in Saudi Arabia when families seek iftar gatherings. Direct pricing removes friction for decision-making. Location tag enables discovery and foot traffic. Arabic-first messaging signals authenticity and respects cultural context. Seasonal timing capitalizes on heightened spending and social dining behavior.
transplantation_caveats: Only effective during Ramadan period; limited year-round applicability
Price point (175 SAR) may not translate to all Saudi demographics or regions
Requires actual physical location with iftar service capability
Cultural sensitivity required around religious observance messaging
cultural_constraints: Must include Ramadan greeting for religious appropriateness
Pricing should reflect premium iftar positioning during holy month
Arabic language preferred for authenticity and local resonance
Avoid imagery that contradicts Ramadan fasting practices
